ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:User {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[r1:POSTS]->(b:Tweet),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:SIMILAR_TO]->(c:Me {screen_name: 'DataNerd'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:TAGS]->(d:Hashtag {name: 'Tech'}),
    p4 = (b)-[r4:USING]->(e:Source {name: 'TwitterAPI'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4
ground.question: How does the engagement score of TechExplorer’s tweets using the TwitterAPI hashtag '#Tech' compare with the centrality of DataNerd’s network, and what kind of content amplification trends do we see in their mutual interactions?

cypher:
MATCH (tech:User {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[:POSTS]->(techTweet:Tweet)-[:USING]->(techSource:Source {name: 'TwitterAPI'})
MATCH (techTweet)-[:TAGS]->(techHashtag:Hashtag {name: '#Tech'})
WITH techTweet, techHashtag
RETURN techTweet.created_at AS TechExplorerEngagementScore
MATCH (data:User {screen_name: 'DataNerd'})-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(mutual:User)
RETURN data.screen_name AS DataNerdCentrality, COLLECT(mutual.screen_name) AS MutualInteractors
